title: DSIP
description:
DSIP, or Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide, is a synthetic nonapeptide with the sequence Trp-Ala-Gly-Gly-Asp-Ala-Ser-Gly-Glu.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: MELANOTAN I
description:
Melanotan I, also known as afamelanotide, is a synthetic alpha-MSH analogue containing Nle4 and D-Phe7 modifications.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: RESEARCH WATER
description:
Research Water is a sterile aqueous diluent.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: MELANOTAN II
description:
Melanotan II is a cyclic synthetic analogue of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH) designed for melanocortin receptor research.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: IPAMORELIN
description:
Ipamorelin is a synthetic pentapeptide growth-hormone secretagogue and selective agonist of the ghrelin/GHS-R1a receptor.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: GLUTATHIONE
description:
Glutathione is a naturally occurring tripeptide composed of glutamate, cysteine, and glycine.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: EPITHALON
description:
Epithalon, also written as Epitalon, is a synthetic tetrapeptide with the sequence Ala-Glu-Asp-Gly.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: KPV
description:
KPV is the C-terminal tripeptide fragment of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH), consisting of Lys-Pro-Val.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: THYMOSIN ALPHA-1
description:
Thymosin Alpha-1, also known as thymalfasin, is an acetylated 28-amino-acid thymic peptide.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: SELANK
description:
Selank is a synthetic heptapeptide derived from the endogenous immunopeptide tuftsin, developed at the Institute of Molecular Genetics in Russia.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: SEMAX
description:
Semax is a synthetic heptapeptide analogue of the ACTH 4–10 fragment developed in Russia.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: GHK-CU
description:
GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring tripeptide-copper complex.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: GHK-CU
description:
GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring tripeptide-copper complex.

This product is intended for research use only.

title: MOTS-C
description:
MOTS-c (Mitochondrial Open Reading Frame of the 12S rRNA-c) is a 16-amino acid peptide encoded within the mitochondrial genome.

This product is strictly for research purposes only.

title: NAD+
description:
NAD+ (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide) is a ubiquitous coenzyme found in all living cells, serving as a fundamental electron carrier in redox reactions.

This product is strictly for research purposes only.

title: BPC-157
description:
BPC-157 is a synthetic 15-amino acid pentadecapeptide derived from a partial sequence of human gastric juice.

This product is intended for laboratory research use only.

description:
BPC-157 is a synthetic 15-amino acid pentadecapeptide derived from a partial sequence of human gastric juice.

This product is intended for laboratory research use only.
